title: AE Pipes
description: The first modpack I made and it's really difficult,though only few mods
body:
**Maybe there are some bugs that I have not been found yet.**

This is a modpack with a lot of difficult challedges like kill a mob below y=-120.

Almost each way of getting items in mods are changed.Sometimes you even hardly prepare for the ingredients according to EMI because EMI is crowded by so many items!!!

The mod , KUBEJS in fabric has many bugs like showing incorrect liquid color that I cannot fix.
